name: Pack Of 12 - Wanpy Dog Treats – Chicken Jerky Dumbbells 100g
description: Carefully prepared through oven-roasting, baking, or freeze-drying methods, this protein-rich snack is designed to support your dog’s overall wellbeing while offering a tasty and engaging chewing experience. Its firm texture encourages healthy chewing habits and can be easily broken into smaller pieces for portion control during training or daily rewarding moments. Low in fat and high in protein, this nutritious snack helps support strong muscles, healthy digestion, and bone strength, making it a great addition to your dog’s balanced diet. It can also be used as an enrichment activity by hiding pieces in toys or around the home to keep your dog mentally stimulated and active. Key Benefits • Delicious chicken jerky dumbbell flavour • Low fat and high protein formula • Supports strong muscles and bone health • Encourages healthy chewing behaviour • Helps support digestion and overall wellbeing • Made with premium-quality ingredients • Easy to break into smaller portions • Suitable for training and enrichment activities Ingredients Chicken, rawhide, sticky rice flour, vegetable protein, glycerin, starch, sorbitol, salt, EC permitted colorants. Guaranteed Analysis • Crude Protein: 65.0% • Crude Fat: 2.0% • Crude Fibre: 0.5% • Crude Ash: 4.0% • Moisture: 14.0% Feeding Instructions Feed as a chew snack between meals. Always provide fresh drinking water. Do not consume the deoxidizer inside the packaging.
